queries.question: Show both comedic and tragedy plays written by Shakespeare.
queries.sql:
SELECT Play.title 
FROM Theatrical_Form JOIN Play ON Theatrical_Form.id = Play.theatricalFormId JOIN Author ON Play.authorId = Author.id
WHERE (Theatrical_Form.form = "Comedy" OR Theatrical_Form.form = "Tragedy") AND Author.name = "Shakespeare"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?theatrical_form a :Theatrical_Form .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasTheatrical_Form ?theatrical_form .
  ?author a :Author .
  ?play p:hasAuthor ?author .
  ?play p:title ?title .
  ?theatrical_form p:form ?form_w .
  ?theatrical_form p:form ?form_w2 .
  ?author p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?form_w) = "Comedy" || STR(?form_w2) = "Tragedy")) && STR(?name_w) = "Shakespeare"))
}

queries.question: Show all the comedies and only those tragedies written by Shakespeare.
queries.sql:
SELECT Play.title 
FROM Theatrical_Form JOIN Play ON Theatrical_Form.id = Play.theatricalFormId JOIN Author ON Play.authorId = Author.id
WHERE Theatrical_Form.form = "Comedy" OR Theatrical_Form.form = "Tragedy" AND Author.name = "Shakespeare"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?theatrical_form a :Theatrical_Form .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasTheatrical_Form ?theatrical_form .
  ?author a :Author .
  ?play p:hasAuthor ?author .
  ?play p:title ?title .
  ?theatrical_form p:form ?form_w .
  ?theatrical_form p:form ?form_w2 .
  ?author p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?form_w) = "Comedy" || (STR(?form_w2) = "Tragedy" && STR(?name_w) = "Shakespeare")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all comedies and tragedies written by Shakespeare.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?theatrical_form a :Theatrical_Form .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasTheatrical_Form ?theatrical_form .
  ?author a :Author .
  ?play p:hasAuthor ?author .
  ?play p:title ?title .
  ?theatrical_form p:form ?form_w .
  ?theatrical_form p:form ?form_w2 .
  ?author p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?form_w) = "Comedy" || STR(?form_w2) = "Tragedy")) && STR(?name_w) = "Shakespeare"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?theatrical_form a :Theatrical_Form .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasTheatrical_Form ?theatrical_form .
  ?author a :Author .
  ?play p:hasAuthor ?author .
  ?play p:title ?title .
  ?theatrical_form p:form ?form_w .
  ?theatrical_form p:form ?form_w2 .
  ?author p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?form_w) = "Comedy" || (STR(?form_w2) = "Tragedy" && STR(?name_w) = "Shakespeare")))
} }
}
